description: Letter by Perahya b. Yosef asking the addressee to go over his comments on a section of the Talmud with his Rav, and then to send him the latter's remarks and corrections, and saying that if the addressee had no time, Rabbi Yosef Ashkenazi would do the copying. (Information from Goitein's index cards.) At the bottom of verso there is a prescription in Arabic script.
